saṅghe bhyo  titana gata pratyu tpanne bhyaḥ  namaḥ samya ggatanāṃ  namaḥ samya kprati pannanāṃ  namaḥ śara dvatī  patraya mahā mataye  namo mahā rṣi iṛṣi gaṇe bhyaḥ  namo maitreya  yoga raja bhiṣi kta pramu khe bhyaḥ  sarva bodhi satva gaṇe bhyaḥ  namo trailo kyādhi pataye  mahā kāla matṛ gaṇa pari vare bhyaḥ  namo amitā bhaya tathā gatāya  namaḥ krodharā jāya  mahā vidyā rāja gaṇa pari vare saha sra vīryaya  sarva bhuta bhaya ṅkarāya  sarva deva bhavana kampo dbha vāya  mahā vikṛta vada nāya  nara siṃ ha mukhāya  dhara dhara  vajra jvala dhara  dhuru dhuru  mahā caṇḍa vega dhara  cara saṅghe bhyo  titana gata pratyu tpanne bhyaḥ  namaḥ samya ggatanāṃ  namaḥ samya kprati pannanāṃ  namaḥ śara dvatī  patraya mahā mataye  namo mahā rṣi iṛṣi gaṇe bhyaḥ  namo maitreya  yoga raja bhiṣi kta pramu khe bhyaḥ  sarva bodhi satva gaṇe bhyaḥ  namo trailo kyādhi pataye  mahā kāla matṛ gaṇa pari vare bhyaḥ  namo amitā bhaya tathā gatāya  namaḥ krodharā jāya  mahā vidyā rāja gaṇa pari vare
